---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see implemented.

## Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

> Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

### Example Usage

How would this feature be used? Include code examples if applicable.

```python
# Example of how the feature might be used
from paladino import new_feature

result = new_feature.do_something()
```

```bash
# Example CLI command
paladino new-command --option value
```

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Impact

Who would benefit from this feature?
- [ ] All users
- [ ] Developers contributing to the project
- [ ] Specific use case (please describe)

## Implementation Ideas

If you have thoughts on how this could be implemented, share them here:

- Modules that would need to be changed
- New dependencies (if any)
- Potential challenges

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, mockups, or references about the feature request here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this hasn't been requested before
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project's goals
- [ ] I am willing to help implement this feature (if yes, please mention in comments)
